title: The Guards Open Fire
description: Luffy pushes ahead toward Robin and CP9, leaving the larger Enies Lobby battle to the rest of the rescue force.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Luffy, Rob Lucci, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. Luffy pushes ahead toward Robin and CP9, leaving the larger Enies Lobby battle to the rest of the rescue force.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What a smart guy he was!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You should at least be thankful!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Waha haha... Oh yeah, by the way...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He'll be taken to Impel down.

summary: Luffy pushes ahead toward Robin and CP9, leaving the larger Enies Lobby battle to the rest of the rescue force.
